summary: GA4 Enhanced E-commerce and Blog SEO Features Testing - All core features verified. Blog API returns 8 posts (5 new SEO posts added). GA4EventTester admin page working. Analytics tracking code verified in all files.

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Failed to load billing data' toast - products API may have auth issue

action_items: Investigate billing data loading issue - products API returns 404
critical_code_review_comments: analytics.js: All 8 enhanced e-commerce tracking functions implemented (view_item, view_item_list, select_item, add_to_cart, begin_checkout, add_payment_info, purchase, refund)
Pricing.js: trackViewItemList called on products load (lines 36-46), enhanced e-commerce events on purchase (lines 98-113)
GA4EventTester.js: All 12 event trigger buttons implemented with proper event firing
Blog API: 8 posts seeded including 5 new SEO articles (GIF maker, Comic avatar, Coloring book, Social hooks, Content repurposing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GA4 enhanced e-commerce tracking fully implemented. Blog SEO posts seeded. GA4EventTester admin page at /app/admin/ga4-tester. Billing page may need products API investigation.

verification_checklist.blog_ui_list: PASS - All posts displayed with search and filters
verification_checklist.blog_ui_detail: PASS - Full article with author and views
